description_long: This is a small, square table with a striking striped pattern alternating between black and a wood-like brown color on its tabletop and legs. The legs are straight and positioned at each corner, with the same striped motif running vertically down their length. The apron beneath the tabletop is lighter in color, resembling a beige or light wood, and is also decorated with a striped pattern on some sides. The table appears to be constructed primarily from wood, possibly with a painted or veneered finish to achieve the bold striping. Its compact size and sturdy build make it suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or outdoor cafes. The overall design is modern and visually distinctive, with no visible drawers or additional features.
description: A small, square table with bold black and brown wood-like stripes and straight legs, featuring a modern, eye-catching design. The apron is lighter in color and also striped, giving the table a unique, decorative appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full striped tabletop and two legs with vertical stripes, as well as a light-colored apron beneath the tabletop.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the striped tabletop and legs, with the apron showing alternating light and dark stripes.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the striped tabletop and legs visible, and a continuous light-colored apron.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the striped tabletop and legs, and a mostly light-colored apron with subtle striping.
